title: Agents frequently die in low health
insight: The majority, 91%, of deaths occur when the agent's health is below 30 HP.

title: Agents often die in corridors
insight: Corridors are a common area where agents frequently die, likely due to low health and limited ammo.
evidence: Not explicitly stated but inferred from the context; consider focusing on specific areas or conditions.

title: Agents fail to succeed in Doom episodes
insight: There were no successful episodes out of 844 runs, indicating a high failure rate.
